description: Panoptispex (#374): Contemptor-Achillus Dreadnought H has flags.effect_ignores_cover=true (from Panoptispex enhancement). In shooting phase, Custodes (player 1) selects the Dreadnought as shooter — verify the flag is present and SELECT_SHOOTER succeeds, proving the unit can shoot with ignores_cover active. [ISS-024: the fixture-baked effect flag is re-injected post-load — effect flags are phase-scoped and the live-state snapshot now clears orphans on phase exit, as the rules intend; the enhancement re-applies it each phase in real play.]
